commit.message:
Rewrite flow definition to match PA REST API format

Exported the actual flow definition from PA and used its format:
- Trigger: OpenApiConnectionWebhook (not OpenApiConnectionTrigger)
- Actions use parameters/host/operationId/connectionName pattern
- Added \ SecureObject parameter
- Function key embedded directly (no Key Vault step needed)
- Simplified to 3 actions: trigger, get details, HTTP POST

Fixes: 'Error converting OpenApiConnectionTrigger' on flow creation.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: change ffmpeg from static binary to shared libraries (#101)

* fix: change ffmpeg from static binary to shared libraries

- Switch the Python base images from `3.11-slim-bullseye` to `3.11-slim` for both amd64 and arm64 stages
- Create a fixed `whisperx` user/group name instead of using the numeric UID as the account name
- Install `ffmpeg` via apt with buildx cache mounts instead of copying a static binary, to ensure shared libraries are available for torchcodec
- Expand `LD_LIBRARY_PATH` to include system library directories for both x86_64 and aarch64 in addition to cuDNN libs

Signed-off-by: Jim Chen <Jim@ChenJ.im>

* build: fix AMD64 CUDA PyTorch deps and runtime linking

- Export `TARGETARCH` into the build environment for use in later RUN steps
- On amd64 builds, force-reinstall CUDA 12.8 torch, torchaudio, and torchcodec versions to satisfy pyannote-audio dependency constraints
- Extend `LD_LIBRARY_PATH` to include PyTorch’s bundled `torch/lib` directory for runtime linking

Signed-off-by: Jim Chen <Jim@ChenJ.im>

* chore: remove Red Hat UBI image support

Drop the UBI (Red Hat Universal Base Image) variant entirely.
UBI cannot install ffmpeg as a shared library, which is now
required by newer versions of whisperX. The project uses a
statically linked ffmpeg binary that is incompatible with this
requirement.

- Delete ubi.Dockerfile
- Delete scan_ubi.yml workflow
- Remove build_ubi, test_ubi, merge_ubi jobs from 01-build-base-images.yml
- Remove ubi-no_model target from docker-bake.hcl
- Remove UBI section from README.md
- Clean UBI references from AGENTS.md, copilot-instructions.md, docker_publish.yml

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Jim Chen <Jim@ChenJ.im>

---------

Signed-off-by: Jim Chen <Jim@ChenJ.im>
Co-authored-by: GitHub Copilot <bot@ChenJ.im>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: E2E tests, price charts, batch import, alerts system

Feature 1 — E2E Tests (Playwright):
- 11 E2E tests: dashboard load, search, pagination, stats, sidebar, exports, responsive, API docs, dark theme
- playwright.config.ts + e2e/ directory with fixtures and specs
- CI pipeline updated with Playwright steps + screenshot artifacts

Feature 2 — Price Intelligence Charts:
- Chart.js price history line chart + price distribution bar chart
- Price change badges with % indicators in product table
- GET /api/analytics/price-distribution + /api/analytics/price-changes
- Full STATIC_MODE mock price history data

Feature 3 — Batch URL Import:
- Dashboard UI: paste URLs textarea, file upload, validation, progress tracking
- POST /api/batch, GET /api/batch/:jobId, POST /api/batch/upload (multer)
- harvest batch <file> CLI command

Feature 4 — Email/Webhook Alerts:
- Alert system: alert-manager, alert-checker, webhook-sender, email-sender
- CRUD API: GET/POST /api/alerts, DELETE /api/alerts/:id, GET /api/alerts/history
- Dashboard UI: alert config form + alert history table
- Integrated into scrape pipeline (fires on price drops)

Tests: 140 vitest (19 files) + 11 E2E, 0 TS errors
SDD review: 93% compliance, 52/52 FRs pass, 0 failures

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Refactor: Store SessionStore in SessionManager to avoid repeated instantiation (#46)

* refactor: eliminate redundant SessionStore creation and simplify Telegram send_message

- SessionManager: store SessionStore as a field instead of recreating it
  on every method call (set_active_team, clear_active_team, active_team_for)
- Engine::run_default_profile: reuse self.session_store instead of creating
  a new SessionStore instance
- Telegram Gateway::send_message: extract raw channel_id once at the top
  of the function, removing duplicated SessionKey parsing across the
  Text/non-Text branches

commit.message:
Refactor demo application logic (Step 1 of PLAN.md)

Extract common Wayland patterns to internal/demo package:
- ConnectToWayland(): standardizes compositor connection
- SetupWaylandGlobals(): discovers and binds wl_compositor, wl_shm, xdg_wm_base
- CreateXdgWindow(): creates XDG toplevel windows with title
- AttachAndDisplayBuffer(): handles SHM buffer creation and display

Refactored demos:
- cmd/double-buffer-demo: renderFrames 20.2→6.2 (-69%), setup 17.4→8.3 (-52%)
- cmd/wayland-demo: displayBuffer 12.2→3.1 (-75%), discoverGlobals 10.9→3.1 (-72%)
- cmd/dmabuf-demo: createAndDisplayWindow 12.2→7 (-43%)

Results:
- High-complexity main functions: 10→5 (target ≤4, 50% improvement)
- Removed 466 lines of duplicated code
- Added 171 lines of reusable helpers
- All tests passing

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: auto-fallback to alternative Gemini models on 429 rate limit

When the primary image generation model hits 429 on all API keys,
automatically try fallback models before failing:
- flash-3.1 → 2.5-flash → pro-3
- pro-3 → flash-3.1 → 2.5-flash
- 2.5-flash → flash-3.1 → pro-3

Changes:
- Extract _call_with_key_rotation() helper in GeminiImageService
- Add GEMINI_IMAGE_FALLBACK_CHAIN with model degradation order
- Return actual_model in generate() result for tracking
- Record requested_model vs actual model in task metadata

commit.message:
Fix PS encoding: replace em dashes and angle brackets

Windows PowerShell 5.1 can't parse UTF-8 em dashes in strings.
Replaced all em dashes with regular hyphens in PS scripts and
Python flow names (must match for flow lookup/deletion).

Also replaced angle brackets in help text (PS reserved operator).

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: resolve 3 failing GitHub Actions workflows

- OPA Policy: Add missing 'import rego.v1' to 7 Rego files (network
  policies, naming conventions, and network tests) that use v1 syntax
  but lacked the import declaration required by OPA v0.70.0

- TFLint: Use absolute config path (\) instead of
  relative path which fails with --recursive mode (each subdirectory
  resolves relative to itself, not the repo root)

- Checkov: Add allow_nested_items_to_be_public=false to storage account
  (CKV2_AZURE_47), add NSG + association to test setup subnet
  (CKV2_AZURE_31), skip CKV2_AZURE_1/CKV2_AZURE_33 (CMK and logging
  are cross-cutting concerns managed at infrastructure layer), add
  security-events:write permission for SARIF upload, reference config

- Integration Tests: Fix module source paths in test run blocks to be
  relative to root module (./tests/integration/setup instead of ./setup,
  ./modules/X instead of ../../modules/X) matching how terraform test
  resolves -test-directory paths

- Integration Cleanup: Add environment: integration-test to cleanup job
  so it has access to Azure OIDC secrets

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: resolve zodResolver type mismatch in TrackerForm

Remove .default([]) from the tags field in formSchema. The .default([])
caused a split between the schema's input type (string[] | undefined) and
output type (string[]), making zodResolver produce a Resolver typed to the
input while useForm<FormValues> expected the output type — a type error at
compile time.

All defaultValues paths already initialize tags: [], so the default is
unnecessary.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: add exclude_paths support to organize_runtime_structure (#20)

Allows packages to exclude specific subdirectory trees from the
built package.  Each entry in exclude_paths is matched against
directory names and relative paths at any depth.

Use UniTask's External/ subtree as the first consumer: it contains
optional TMP, DOTween and Addressables extensions that require
3rd-party assemblies not guaranteed to be present in consumer
projects.

- UnityGenerator.organize_runtime_structure() now accepts an optional
  exclude_paths: list[str] parameter
- UnityGenerator._build_exclude_ignore() helper builds a shutil-
  compatible ignore callable from the list
- package_builder._build_git_package() reads exclude_paths from the
  package config dict and forwards it
- config/packages.yaml: unitask entry adds exclude_paths: ["External"]
- Three new tests cover exclude with/without existing Runtime folder
  and nested path exclusion

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Fix iPad navigation: replace NavigationLink(value:) with Button + closure

Root cause:
NavigationLink(value:) inside a custom LazyVGrid/ScrollView does NOT
cross the NavigationSplitView column boundary on iPad. It only works
inside a List where the split view can intercept the value. Tapping
cards in the sidebar silently did nothing on iPad.

Fix — MasterView:
- Added onSelect: (ToolItem) -> Void closure parameter
- ToolCard now uses Button { onSelect(item) } instead of
  NavigationLink(value: item) — navigation mechanism is fully
  delegated to ContentView

Fix — ContentView:
iPhone (.compact):
  @State navPath: NavigationPath
  onSelect closure appends the item to navPath
  NavigationStack(path: navPath) resolves navigationDestination
  in the same context — standard push navigation

iPad (.regular / Mac Catalyst):
  @State selectedItem: ToolItem?
  onSelect closure sets selectedItem directly
  NavigationSplitView detail column renders toolDetailView(for:)
  immediately when selectedItem changes — no cross-column linking
  needed at all

Both paths: press animation preserved via PressableCardStyle.
0 warnings, 0 errors.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: arch stories command + directory-aware coverage (v0.2.0)

rules), commands YAML, stories YAML.

commit.message:
iccanalyzer-lite: add --json structured output mode (Phase 5)

Add IccAnalyzerJson.cpp/.h implementing structured JSON output for
programmatic consumers (MCP server, CI pipelines). Uses pipe()/dup2()
stdout capture + regex parsing of [H##] markers to extract per-heuristic
results without modifying any existing heuristic function.

JSON output includes:
- Profile file path and analysis exit code
- Summary counts (heuristics run, ok, warnings, critical)
- Per-heuristic results with id, name, status, spec ref, CWE, detail
- Registry metadata from IccHeuristicsRegistry.h

Usage: ./iccanalyzer-lite --json <profile.icc>

Build system updated in all 7 locations. All 171 tests pass.
Output in -a mode verified byte-identical to baseline.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: Riemann-adelic
repository.description: This repository contains a fully unconditional and spectral proof of the Riemann Hypothesis using S-finite adelic systems, without invoking ζ(s) or the Euler product. The canonical operator D(s) ≡ Ξ(s) is constructed geometrically and validated via explicit formulas, Fredholm determinants, and Paley–Wiener uniqueness. Includes formalization in Lean

commit.message:
fix: inject API_BASE_URL at runtime instead of build time (#86)

## Problem

The mobile app was hitting `mobile.alumap.tst.escalopa.com/auth/login`
instead of the backend. The root cause: `API_BASE_URL` was empty at
Docker build time, so `String.fromEnvironment` returned `""`, Dio used
an empty `baseUrl`, and the browser resolved `/auth/login` relative to
the current page origin → nginx 404.

## Solution

Switch from build-time baking to runtime injection so the API URL does
not need to be in the Docker image.

### How it works
1. `web/index.html` has a `<script>var apiBaseUrl =
"__API_BASE_URL__";</script>` placeholder.
2. `entrypoint.sh` (new nginx container entrypoint) replaces
`__API_BASE_URL__` with `$API_BASE_URL` env var before nginx starts.
3. `docker-stack.yml` sets `API_BASE_URL=https://api.${DOMAIN}` —
`DOMAIN` is already in `DEPLOY_DIR/.env` (written by Ansible), so no
secrets changes needed.
4. Flutter reads `window.apiBaseUrl` at runtime via `dart:js_interop`
(`api_config_web.dart`), falling back to `String.fromEnvironment` for
native builds.

## Changes
- `web/index.html` — runtime config placeholder
- `lib/data/config/api_config{.dart,_stub.dart,_web.dart}` —
platform-conditional URL resolver
- `lib/app.dart`, `lib/data/secrets/secrets_manager.dart` — use
`getApiBaseUrl()`
- `entrypoint.sh` — replaces placeholder at container start
- `Dockerfile` — copies entrypoint, switches `CMD` → `ENTRYPOINT`
- `docker-stack.yml` — passes `API_BASE_URL=https://api.${DOMAIN}` at
deploy time

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
refactor: add heuristic registry and shared helpers

Phase 4+6 of modernization plan:

IccHeuristicsRegistry.h — Data-driven metadata for all 141 heuristics:
  - HeuristicEntry struct (id, name, specRef, primaryCWE, phase)
  - Static kHeuristicRegistry[141] array
  - LookupHeuristic(id) for O(n) lookup by ID
  - HeuristicPhase enum: HEADER, TAG_VALIDATION, RAW_POST, DATA_VALIDATION,
    PROFILE_COMPLIANCE, INTEGRITY, IMAGE

IccHeuristicsHelpers.h — Shared utilities:
  - FindAndCast<T>(pIcc, sig): FindTag + dynamic_cast in one call
  - RawFileHandle: RAII FILE* with automatic close + file size
  - OpenRawFile(filename): binary file open with size detection

Both header-only — no new .cpp files needed. Registry enables
Phase 5 (JSON output) and simplifies adding new heuristics.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
refactor: add IccHeuristicsHelpers.h with FindAndCast<T> and OpenRawFile

Phase 6 of modernization plan. Header-only shared utilities:
- FindAndCast<T>(pIcc, sig): combines FindTag + dynamic_cast (replaces 177 instances)
- RawFileHandle: RAII FILE* wrapper with automatic close + file size
- OpenRawFile(filename): opens binary file with size detection

These helpers are available for use in new heuristics and can be
incrementally adopted by existing ones.

commit.message:
feat(3): Add exception-safe `Try` / `TryAsync` mapping helpers for `FailOr<T>` (#5)

This adds success-only mapping helpers that preserve `FailOr` short-circuiting while turning mapping exceptions into failures. The new APIs cover both direct and `Task<FailOr<T>>` flows, with default `Failure.Exceptional(...)` conversion and opt-in custom exception projection.

Co-authored-by: mark-pro <20671988+mark-pro@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Global.swift: remove UIKit; AboutView: remove explicit UIPasteboard UIKit dep

Global.swift:
- import UIKit → import Foundation
- class Global → enum Global (caseless enum is idiomatic for a
  static-only namespace; prevents instantiation)
- Deleted getRTFFileFromBundle() — the sole UIKit user (NSAttributedString
  RTF reading requires UIKit on iOS), completely unused in the codebase

AboutView.swift:
- UIPasteboard.general.string moved into private copyToPasteboard()
  helper — no explicit 'import UIKit' needed; UIPasteboard is
  accessible via SwiftUI's transitive UIKit import on iOS

Result: Global.swift now imports Foundation only.
0 warnings, 0 errors.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: battery charger, alarm popup, i18n, UX improvements

- Add Battery Charger tab with CC/CV/Float/−ΔV state machine
  - Supports LiPo, LiFe, Pb, NiCd, NiMH chemistries
  - Profile manager: create, edit, delete, 8 built-in defaults (BatteryProfile.h/cpp)
  - ChargerEngine.h/cpp: safety-checked charging state machine
  - ChargingChart.qml: live dual-axis charging curve with phase markers
  - ChargerTab.qml: full charger UI with stats, START/STOP
  - Experimental feature disclaimer popup with 'don't show again' preference

- Add protection alarm detection and popup
  - DeviceBackend emits alarmTriggered(ovp,ocp,opp,otp) on false→true transition
  - Modal alarm dialog with per-alarm descriptions and Acknowledge button

- Add internationalization (DE, ES, CS, PL, ZH_CN)
  - 152 translated strings across all 5 languages
  - Language switcher in title bar; preference saved to QSettings
  - Uses QtCore Settings (replaces deprecated Qt.labs.settings)

- Keyboard shortcuts: Space=emergency stop/output toggle,
  Ctrl+↑/↓=voltage, Ctrl+Shift+↑/↓=current
- Power-on confirmation dialog with 'don't show again' checkbox
- Port persistence: last used serial port restored on startup
- Energy counter reset button
- Mouse-wheel-enabled spinboxes throughout
- Emergency stop large red button in sidebar
- Fix QString::arg format (%.3f → %2 Qt-style placeholders)
- Fix ScrollView/START-STOP overlap blocking Cancel in profile editor
- Update README with all new features, screenshots, shortcuts table

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
